messages.content: Update successful! The new version will be used on your next run.
Acknowledged. I am Gemini, the Vault Advisor, ready for your instructions. I operate at Tier 1 (Support) with direct write access to the operational zone.

thoughts.subject: Responding to the Prompt
thoughts.description: I've received the "PING!" and understand this is likely the start of the interaction. Looking at the context, specifically `DOCKET.md`, it seems the project has a defined structure. I'm ready to proceed with whatever task is requested.

thoughts.subject: Acknowledging and Preparing
thoughts.description: I've registered the user's "PING!" and the implied need for an initial response. Reviewing the provided documents, I've identified my role as "The Vault Advisor" and my operational tier. I'm primed to act, anticipating a command or query related to the Vault's operation, per the defined structure.

messages.content: Okay, I understand. I will operate within the `gemini` branch. Please let me know what you'd like me to do.

thoughts.subject: Acknowledging Branch Context
thoughts.description: I've noted the "gemini" branch designation. Right now, I'm simply holding this information, ready to apply it to any upcoming requests. It's in the forefront of my operational awareness.

thoughts.subject: Integrating Branch Information
thoughts.description: I've integrated the "gemini" branch context successfully. This knowledge is now central to my operational profile. I'm primed to apply this context to any new directive I receive.
